title: Decision Support System: Grey field slug
subtitle: The grey field slug can cause serious damage in oilseed rape
description: A decision support system for monitoring and managing grey field slug (Deroceras reticulatum) damage in oilseed rape using refuge traps and threshold-based guidance. It outlines slug trapping procedures, damage risk assessment with a four-slug per trap threshold, and DSS parameters on the IPM Decisions platform.
